summary: Iteration 26: YouTube API Integration Testing - Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 8 features tested and working. Real YouTube Data API v3 integration with Kaizer Nigha channel fully functional.

passed_tests: GET /api/youtube/videos - Returns real videos from Kaizer Nigha channel (12 videos)
Videos have required fields: id (11 chars), title, thumbnail (ytimg.com URL), published_at
Videos are from Kaizer Nigha channel (channel_title field verified)
max_results parameter limits returned videos correctly
channel_id parameter allows querying specific channels
GET /api/youtube/live - Returns is_live boolean and streams array
Live streams structure validated (if present)
channel_id parameter works for live endpoint
GET /api/youtube/channel - Returns channel info object
Channel title is 'Kaizer Nigha'
Channel has statistics: subscriber_count=1,110,000, video_count=2,849, view_count=14,065,712
Channel has valid HTTPS thumbnail URL
Channel ID matches UCTDsrLjZs9otGHBm4YoEK-A
Frontend /videos page loads with real YouTube videos
Channel banner shows Kaizer Nigha with 1.1M subscribers, 2.8K videos, 14.1M views
Subscribe button links to https://www.youtube.com/@KaizerNigha
Live TV and Videos tabs present and switchable
12 video cards displayed with YouTube thumbnails
Click video card opens YouTube embed player modal
Modal closes with X button
Live TV tab shows 'No Live Stream Right Now' with Watch Videos fallback
Refresh button reloads data

frontend_videos_page.channel_banner: Shows Kaizer Nigha logo, name, subscriber/video/view counts
frontend_videos_page.video_grid: 12 real YouTube videos with thumbnails and titles
frontend_videos_page.video_modal: YouTube embed player opens on click
frontend_videos_page.live_section: Shows 'No Live Stream' message when channel not live

critical_code_review_comments: youtube.py: Clean implementation using google-api-python-client, proper error handling with try/except blocks
VideoNews.jsx: Well-structured React component with loading states, tab switching, video modal
Good use of data-testid attributes for testing (video-news-page, tab-live, tab-videos, subscribe-btn, etc.)
Real YouTube Data API v3 integration - NO MOCKED APIs
seed_data_creation: None - using real YouTube API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: YouTube integration fully tested. 3 API endpoints: /api/youtube/videos (returns channel videos), /api/youtube/live (live stream status), /api/youtube/channel (channel info). Frontend at /videos route shows Kaizer Nigha channel with 1.1M subscribers. Video cards open YouTube embed modal. Live TV tab shows fallback message when no live stream. All using real YouTube Data API v3, no mocked data.
